⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 NYT : U.S. President Trump’s Board of Peace has demanded that Hamas finalise an agreement to demilitarise Gaza by the end of this week. The proposal would require Hamas to give up virtually all its weapons and share maps of its tunnel network. In return, Israeli forces would withdraw from much or all of the territory, restrictions on goods would be lifted, militants would be granted amnesty, and temporary housing caravans would be delivered. Board and Hamas representatives are expected to meet in Cairo on Tuesday. Hamas has protested that Israel has not upheld the October 2025 ceasefire, citing insufficient aid trucks and continued Israeli attacks. The group’s military spokesman said giving up weapons at the table while Israel fails to implement its obligations is unacceptable. @wfwitness
